events.output:
{"ok":true,"data":{"id":"PRR_kwDORRc9487ngHfx","state":"CHANGES_REQUESTED","url":"https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/447#pullrequestreview-3883956209","body":"Thanks for the update. I reviewed the diff and found several blocking issues that need to be fixed before merge.

run_1772555729706

Required fixes:
1) `src/utils/helpers.ts` has a typo in the import keyword (`improt`), which causes a syntax error and prevents compilation.
2) `divide` currently returns `a / 0` instead of using the `b` parameter. This makes the function incorrect for all inputs and can produce `Infinity`/`-Infinity`.
3) `waitForReady` is an unbounded busy loop (`while (true)`) with no break/yield/backoff, which will peg CPU and never return. Replace this with a non-blocking readiness strategy (event, timeout/poll with delay, or async signal) and define an exit condition.

Please address these and re-request review."}}

events.content:
Done — I reviewed PR #447, left detailed inline comments on the problematic lines, and submitted a `REQUEST_CHANGES` review.

- Review URL: `https://github.com/aryeko/ghx-bench-fixtures/pull/447#pullrequestreview-3883956209`
- Summary comment includes the required run ID: `run_1772555729706`
- Inline comments were added for:
  - `src/utils/helpers.ts:2` (`improt` typo causing parse/compile failure)
  - `src/utils/helpers.ts:8` (`divide` ignores `b` and divides by zero)
  - `src/utils/helpers.ts:12` (infinite busy loop in `waitForReady`)
